programme.title: Billy the Kid Returns
programme.desc: Rogers plays a lookalike to the dead Billy The Kid and restores the tranquility of Lincoln County after subduing the criminal element

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: Invincible Super Chan
programme.desc: Invincible Super Chan

programme.title: Snake In The Eagles Shadow
programme.desc: Snake In The Eagles Shadow

programme.title: Shaolin Super Dragon
programme.desc: Shaolin Super Dragon

programme.title: Return of the Tiger
programme.desc: Return of the Tiger

programme.title: Whos Sorry Now
programme.desc: During the Second World War the British commander of Singapore believed it to be an impregnable fortress until a numerically inferior Japanese Army overran it Similarly 12 years on the French lost the mountain garrison at Dien Bien Phu after failing to anticipate the resourcefulness of General Giap and his Vietmanese peasant army

programme.title: 13 Hours That Saved Britain
programme.desc: 13 Hours That Saved Britain

programme.title: USS Constitution
programme.desc: A technical marvel of her time Constitution gave our young republic its first victories at sea and began a tradition of excellence for the US Navy Now restored to her original splendour the Constitution is now the oldest commissioned vessel in the US NavyRelive the legend and watch this famous ship as she reaffirms Americas dreams as her crew sails into the twenty-first century

programme.title: Stagecoach to Denver
programme.desc: Lambert has the stagecoach wrecked killing the Commissioner so his phony replacement can alter Coonskins land survey When Red Ryder exposes the survey hoax Lambert has his stooge Sheriff put Red in jail

programme.title: Rim of the Canyon
programme.desc: ene Autrys stolen horse turns up in a ghost town where Gene goes after he is left stranded during a stagecoach race

programme.title: The Last Command
programme.desc: In this fact-based film legendary Texan Jim Bowie Sterling Hayden attempts to come to a nonviolent compromise with Mexican President Santa Anna J Carrol Naish but the negotiations soon turn sour Consuelo de Quesada Anna Maria Alberghetti a Mexican girl with close ties to Jim then warns him that Santa Anas men are planning to invade So Jim Davy Crockett Arthur Hunnicutt and a tiny crew of courageous Texans hide out in an abandoned mission awaiting the violent confrontation

programme.title: The Fastest Gun Alive
programme.desc: In the western frontier town of Cross Creek storekeeper George Temple is a polite and soft spoken man with a secret past When 3 bank robbers on the lam stop in town to change horses Georges past comes back to haunt him

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Married sleazy advertising executive and music producer Bob Ames finds gorgeous seductive Cathie Marks hiding in his cabin in the woods during a rainstorm Is she a dream come true or something more sinister and dangerous

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: With Eric apparently dead in the morgue Alamo Joe recovers from his wounds in the hospital and reevaluates his life decisions He fears he was bitten and will now become a werewolf Eric returns from the dead and escapes from the morgue

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks the werewolf Janos Skorzeny to Hollywood where Skorzeny has been killing prostitutes But Eric is mistaken for the killer

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Forever Knight

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A frustrated dreamer turns to the supernatural to achieve success using an ornate pipe to eliminate anyone who gets in his way

programme.title: Theater of Blood
programme.desc: A Shakespearean actor takes poetic revenge on the critics who denied him recognition

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Following an Elvis sighting to The Springwood Hotel a tabloid reporter finds that the phony stories that he writes come true Meanwhile an amnesiac has a terrifying dream that he committed murder before losing his memory

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Three pledges for a fraternity on probation run by a soft-spoken leader and his 2 sidekicks are visited by a beautiful young sorority gal whos looking for a frat to pledge her own sorority ends up tagging along with the pledges to an abandoned house where an urban legend murder took place years before Led by the obnoxious pledge master the trio of pledges must enter the house and pass each test given to them The question is ; will they survive

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: Tales From the Crypt

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Predatory electronics salesman Jack Rhodes uses a video dating service to pick up lonely young women for one-night stands but meets his match in cunning enticing Barbara who invites Jack on a date to her high-rise apartment loft

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max and 99 go to a South American country dressed as flamenco dancers to save the President of the country

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: B J McKay a guitar-playing independent trucker who travels with a fun-loving chimpanzee named Bear finds himself caught up with a bunch of young women trying to flee a white slaver who happens to be the local sheriff The Foundlings part 1

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur Post and his wife Carol move into their first house They find the previous tenants horse abandoned in the backyard barn Carol insists on selling the animal but Wilbur wants to keep it To his surprise the horse agrees with him

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The Posts neighbor Roger catches Mister Ed and Wilbur talking to each other

programme.title: Hogans 324
programme.desc: Hogans 324

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Learning that the German army is manufacturing an improved Tiger tank Hogan and his men are determined to steal one so they can disassemble it and make blueprints for the Allies

programme.title: Mchale 413
programme.desc: Mchale 413

programme.title: Mchale 303
programme.desc: Mchale 303

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Klink reluctantly falls in with two other Kommandants plotting against Burkhalter Burkhalter finds out Now Hogan must step in before Stalag 13 loses Klink the military way - by firing squad

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Hogans operation is known to a Gestapo man who wants to trade his knowledge for 1000000 in diamonds but can he be trusted

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan finds a young jungle boy on the island as well as a helium supply that the professor plans to use to get rescued with a makeshift hot-air balloon

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways find parts of an ancient Hieroglyphic stone tablet that may tell them the way to get off the island

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: To join a secret club known as the Imperial Demons Little Luke must go into an abandoned haunted house at night and succeed in taking a light all the way to the top floor

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa tries to marry off a friend in danger of being deported

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS is going to stop Smart from testifying against one of their agents

programme.title: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren
programme.desc: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren

programme.title: THE HILLSIDE STRANGLERS
programme.desc: Kenneth is obsessed with the police he moves to LA with his cousin Angelo convinces him to start a prostitution business Frustrated decide on revenge feeling a great pleasure with her death The two cousins become addicted to death

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Neron captures the Herculoids to fight gladiatorial battles in his arenaThe Temple of Trax seems to be abandoned In reality the high priest has a plan to kidnap Tara and sacrifice her for the return of Trax after 2000 years

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget is on holiday at the Winter Olympics where Dr Claw plans to sabotage the games by replacing the torch bearer Gadget also faces the MAD yodeler and a Yeti-like Snowbot

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget

programme.title: Woman Of Straw
programme.desc: Tyrannical but ailing tycoon Charles Richmond becomes very fond of his attractive Italian nurse Maria The nurse in turn falls in love with Charles neer-do-well nephew Anthony who plots ways to gain control of his uncles fortune

programme.title: Earth Final Conflct
programme.desc: Lili wakes up supposedly on Earth after a coma and is told the Jaridians have come and conquered the Taelons She remembers Sandoval telling her she no longer has and Earth-based physiology and believes things are not as they seem

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Harrison falls in love with an alien who was once a slave to the Morthren and who has been revived from stasis to help them restore their power cells

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: An attractive reporter arrives unannounced to interview Arcane but she is not what she seems and her hidden agenda threatens both the doctor and the swamp

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Swamp Thing helps Cathy comprehend her late alienated mother by showing her visions of her mothers teen-age life

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The Alphans land on the planet Arkadia where glyphs suggest it is the cradle of civilisation from which life on Earth began Now it is desolate and Koenig feels it is unsuitable for colonisation Two renegade crew members have other ideas however and take Helena hostage in their demands to settle on Arkadia

programme.title: Beneath the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Time-displaced astronaut Taylor and the mute Nova[a] travel through the desert of the Forbidden Zone in search of a new life away from Ape City Without warning fire shoots up from the ground and chasms open Confused by this Taylor investigates a cliff wall and disappears through it Unable to reach him Nova is left alone

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Boss gets Uncle Jesse to enter a contest for a new type of fossil fuel saying that moonshine is the perfect way to cut down on pollution However Boss has more up his sleeve He plans to tip off the authorities and once Jesse is arrested take credit for the idea himself

programme.title: Hercules
programme.desc: Hercules

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Zoor and Daan travel to a cloister for an energy sharing ceremony but one of the sisters is killed and everyone is a suspect

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Three band members have the perfect racket a diamond heist But one guy sees the driver and then makes that known on public TV

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Cinnamon works to stop a munitions magnate who is supplying arms to neo-nazis She reawakens memories of his late wife who was murdered by Hitler

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: After being recognized Kimble is shot and then hospitalized Lt Gerard arrives to claim him but a surprise awaits - someone else now claims to be the murderer of Kimbles wife

programme.title: BIg Valley
programme.desc: As unrest grips a distant mining town where the Barkleys have financial interests Heath travels to the place in an attempt to diffuse the situation

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: When Cheyenne visits Jim ONeil in Texas he learns he is to hang the next day Jim refuses to give Cheyenne any details nor did he defend himself at his trial Against Jims wishes Cheyenne investigates the situation to save his friend

programme.title: Young 311
programme.desc: Young 311

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streers of San Francisco
programme.desc: The murder of a pregnant girl leads Stone and Keller to arrogant radio host Terry Vine who has a large female fanbase The dead girl claimed to be pregnant with Vines baby giving him a motive for murder and after her blackmailing roommate also turns up dead Keller is convinced Vine is the killer

programme.title: Nothing Scripted
programme.desc: Nothing Scripted Guy buys Lamborghini in Destin with COVID money"

programme.title: Outdoors
programme.desc: See the Boat Car on BeachBilly Lifestyle Top Ten Best Fish To Eat by Capt SGT Peterson See the Boat Car on BeachBilly Lifestyle Four Stunning National Forest L"

programme.title: Embryo
programme.desc: A twisted scientist performs an experiment on a human foetus to accelerate growth from a foetus into an adult in just a few days The experiment results in a beautiful 22-year-old woman who falls in love with her creator

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Escape Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Three apes travel back in time after Earths destruction and land on earth in the 70s They acquire celebrity status after revealing that they can talk but things take a turn for the worse soon

programme.title: Krull
programme.desc: On the planet of Krull an evil creature called the Beast decimates the worlds army and kidnaps the lovely Princess Lyssa Lysette Anthony who is destined to become queen Her brave beau Prince Colwyn Ken Marshall leads a motley band of warriors including Ergo David Battley and Kegan Liam Neeson to rescue his beloved However before he can face the Beast Colwyn must locate a mystical weapon known as the Glaive which he can use to slay the hideous villain

programme.title: Conquest of the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Following a North American pandemic from a space-borne disease that wiped out all dogs and cats in 1983 the government has become a series of Schutzstaffel-patterned police states that took chimpanzees gorillas and orangutans as pets before establishing a culture based on ape slave labor These events were foretold in 1973 as testimony by two chimpanzee scientists who came from the distant future Cornelius and Zira before they were killed Widely believed to be dead their baby was secretly raised by the circus owner Armando as a young horseback rider In 1991 now fully grown and named Caesar the ape is brought to one of the cities to distribute flyers for Armandos circus During their trip Armando advises Caesar not to speak in public for fear of his life

programme.title: The Chinese Connection
programme.desc: A young martial arts student returns home for the funeral of his martial arts teacher who died under mysterious circumstances A rival Japanese academy are suspected but there is no proof

programme.title: Runaway
programme.desc: A group of skiers are trapped inside a runaway train hurtling down a mountainside

programme.title: No Retreat No Surrender
programme.desc: After his father is abused by some thugs a teenager considers Bruce Lees spirit as his teacher Later he trains to become a martial arts professional to avenge his fathers humiliation

programme.title: Firewalker
programme.desc: Two seasoned adventurers recruited by a seemingly psychic woman with a treasure map go on an adventure to recover a horde of gold belonging to an ancient being called the Firewalker

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk Returns
programme.desc: Hopefully on the verge of curing his Hulk condition Banner meets his colleague Don Blake who is mystically linked to a Viking warrior Thor

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Married sleazy advertising executive and music producer Bob Ames finds gorgeous seductive Cathie Marks hiding in his cabin in the woods during a rainstorm Is she a dream come true or something more sinister and dangerous

programme.desc: With Eric apparently dead in the morgue Alamo Joe recovers from his wounds in the hospital and reevaluates his life decisions He fears he was bitten and will now become a werewolf Eric returns from the dead and escapes from the morgue

programme.title: Dawn of the Dead
programme.desc: During an escalating zombie epidemic two Philadelphia SWAT team members a traffic reporter and his TV executive girlfriend seek refuge in a secluded shopping mall

programme.title: Wes Cravens Night Visions
programme.desc: A cop teams up with a psychic to track down a serial killer

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: House II The Second Story
programme.desc: A man Arye Gross and his friend Jonathan Stark exhume an ancestor Royal Dano in the house where his parents were killed

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Jonas Correia v. Luis Diogo

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in Hard Knocks' cage. Greg Steen v. Elvis Vukaj.

programme.title: The Sam Kwasman Interview
programme.desc: Meet the man who is the original voice of Donald Duck-Mr Sam Kwasman Also the legendary Freda Payne returns to the show to speak about her recent Induction

programme.title: The Annalisa Guidone Interview
programme.desc: The lovely actress Annalisa stops by the show to talk about the dark side of being a female in the industry

programme.title: The Kendall Ferguson Interview
programme.desc: The hilarious Chicago Comedian Kendall Ferguson returns to the show to talk about his new book and why he needs to stop stealing

programme.title: The DC Glenn Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: Meet the man who created a 90s anthem that set the trend for Hip Hop Music today

programme.title: The Cynda Williams Interview
programme.desc: Meet the lady who became a star in the 1990s hit movie Mo Betta Blues Hear how selling herself out to become rich was and still isnt an option

programme.title: The Chico Brown Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: From being the Co-defendant to Rick Ross to becoming a successful film maker Chico Brown stops by the show to set the record straight

programme.title: The Sean Kanan Interview
programme.desc: Sherard sits down with Cobra Kai star Sean Kanan aka Mr Mike Barnes Learn how the success of Karate Kid 3 and Cobra Kai still amazes him

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain sets a trap by showing the N team she is defeated and also opens up a warp zone with Kevins neighborhood shown on the other side Foolishly Kevin goes through and the members of his team are captured and banished to the Black Hole Warp Zone Kevin realizes hes actually on Metroid Then he succeeds into getting back to the Palace and rescuing the N team

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: On his birthday Mega Man really wishes to become human So he is ready to pass the Three Challenges to accomplish humanity

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The pupils seek out and find Merlin and hell teach the pupil Presto magic if he stays with Merlin Presto decides to stay and attempts a spell to create a way home but the spell summons dragons instead which attack a nearby village

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters Sir John a seemingly fearless knight But hes really a coward his village is ready to exile him unless he performs one brave deed Venger captures Sir Johns son and tells him to lead the group into a trap

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
